D9 BiologyL4 AnalyzeReference

Eumelanin vs Pheomelanin — Two Pigments, One Skin

eumelanin (brown-black) absorbs broadly across the visible and UV; pheomelanin (red-yellow) absorbs only blue; their ratio sets skin and hair colour

All human skin and hair colour comes from two melanin types in different ratios. Eumelanin (5,6-dihydroxyindole polymer) absorbs across the spectrum — dark brown to black. Pheomelanin (benzothiazine) absorbs only short wavelengths — red-yellow. Red hair is high pheo / low eu; black hair is high eu / negligible pheo. Tanning increases eumelanin synthesis.

Drag the eu/pheo ratio. Hair swatch transitions from red → blonde → brown → black.
